article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks in Affordable Rental Units at 5938 Olive Avenue Under New Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council approved a legally binding housing agreement with Olive Properties Inc., requiring the developer to provide non-market (below-market-rate) rental units in their new mixed-use building at 5938 Olive Avenue. The agreement sets rules on who can rent those units and at what price.
briefs.action_required: If you own rental property in Burnaby, review how similar housing agreements may affect your future development plans.
